reward.text: Set any one stock to exactly $5
Gain $1 per stock card you currently hold

hand.ability: When gained, increase any stock by 1
When gained, Orange +1. When sold, Orange -1
When gained, increase any stock by 1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, Yellow +1. When sold, Yellow -1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1

market.name: The Squeeze
market.description: Increase one stock by +2 OR decrease one stock by -2

mainDeck.name: Connected Broker
mainDeck.description: For rest of game, gain +$1 per stock when you sell

mainDeck.name: Newspaper Exposé
mainDeck.effect: When revealed as a face-up market card: +1 to End Game Tracker. Remove from game to tracker pile. Draw replacement card.

mainDeck.ability: When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action
When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, decrease any stock by 1
When gained, Blue +1. When sold, Blue -1
When gained, increase any stock by 1

mainDeck.name: Pump and Dump
mainDeck.description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price immediately

mainDeck.name: Preferred Bidder
mainDeck.description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

mainDeck.name: Wild Speculation
mainDeck.description: Flip top card from deck, then increase OR decrease that stock by +/-3

mainDeck.ability: When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

mainDeck.name: Hostile Takeover
mainDeck.description: Choose another player, look at their hand, take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $5 from the bank

discardPile.name: Tipster's Choice
discardPile.description: Draw 2 cards from deck, keep 1, return other to bottom

discardPile.name: Stock Certificate Forgery
discardPile.description: Complete any one goal using one fewer card than required

discardPile.ability: When gained, Purple +1. When sold, Purple -1
When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

discardPile.name: Corner the Market
discardPile.description: Take any face-up stock from market for free

discardPile.ability: When gained, increase any stock by 1
When sold, draw an unused Insider Tip Action

log: Game initialized with 3 players, 39 cards in deck, 5 in market, tracker at 0/10.
T1: Morgan auctions Blue stock_up (stock-5), wins at $5. stock_up: Yellow +1 (5→6). Market refill: Purple blank (stock-28).
T2: Astor auctions Purple blank (stock-26), wins at $2. Market refill: Orange blank (stock-9).
T3: Hearst auctions Orange insider (stock-16), wins at $3. Market refill: Purple hype (stock-31).
T4: Morgan auctions Tipster's Choice (action-33), wins at $6. Market refill: Yellow hype (stock-23).
T5: Astor auctions Purple hype (stock-31), wins at $4. Hype: Purple +1 (5→6). Market refill: Yellow blank (stock-18).
T6: Hearst auctions Yellow hype (stock-23), wins at $4. Hype: Yellow +1 (6→7). Market refill: Orange stock_down (stock-14).
T7: Morgan plays Tipster's Choice. Drew Stock Certificate Forgery + Rumor Mill. Keeps Forgery, returns Rumor Mill to bottom.
T8: Astor claims 2 Purple goal (goal-62). Steals $1 from Hearst. Tracker 0→1.
T9: Hearst auctions Yellow blank (stock-18), wins at $5. Market refill: Blue insider (stock-8).
T10: Morgan plays Stock Certificate Forgery to claim 2 Blue goal (goal-59) with 1 Blue stock. Gains $2. Tracker 1→2.
T11: Astor auctions Purple blank (stock-28). All players pass. Auction fails, card stays in market.
T12: Hearst claims 2 Yellow goal (goal-61). Sets Purple to $5 (was $6). Tracker 2→3.
T13: Morgan plays insider tip 'Orange -2 / Yellow +1' (itip-57). Orange 5→3, Yellow 7→8. Tracker 3→4.
T14: Astor sells Purple hype (stock-31) for $5. Hype: Purple -1 (5→4).
T15: Hearst plays insider tip 'Yellow +2 / Purple -1' (itip-55). Yellow 8→10, Purple 4→3. Tracker 4→5.
T16: Morgan auctions Blue insider (stock-8), wins at $5. Market refill: Orange stock_up (stock-13).
T17: Astor plays insider tip 'Orange +2 / Yellow +1' (itip-50). Orange 3→5, Yellow stays 10 (capped). Tracker 5→6.
T18: Hearst sells Orange insider (stock-16) for $5. Insider ability: draws itip-58 (Yellow -2 / Purple +1).
T19: Morgan auctions Orange stock_up (stock-13), wins at $4. stock_up: Blue +1 (5→6). Market refill: Blue blank (stock-2).
T20: Astor sells Purple blank (stock-26) for $3.
T21: Hearst auctions Purple blank (stock-28). Astor wins at $2. Market refill: Orange hype (stock-15).
T22: Morgan auctions Orange hype (stock-15), wins at $3. Hype: Orange +1 (5→6). Market refill: Corner the Market (action-34).
T23: Astor plays insider tip 'Yellow +2 / Purple +1' (itip-51). Yellow stays 10 (capped), Purple 3→4. Tracker 6→7.
T24: Hearst auctions Corner the Market (action-34). Astor wins at $2. Market refill: Purple stock_up (stock-29).
T25: Morgan claims 2 Blue + 2 Orange goal (goal-67). Gains $4. Tracker 7→8.
T26: Astor plays Corner the Market (action-34). Takes Orange blank (stock-11) for free. Market refill: Yellow stock_down (stock-22).
T27: Hearst auctions Yellow stock_down (stock-22), wins at $7. stock_down: Orange -1 (6→5). Market refill: Yellow blank (stock-17).
T28: Morgan sells Orange stock_up (stock-13) for $5.
T29: Astor sells Purple blank (stock-28) for $4.
T30: Hearst claims 3 Yellow goal (goal-65). Gains $3 ($1 per stock, 3 stocks held). Tracker 8→9.
T31: Morgan auctions Purple stock_up (stock-29), wins at $4. stock_up: Blue +1 (6→7). Market refill: Blue blank (stock-4).
T32: Astor sells Orange blank (stock-11) for $5.
T33: Hearst auctions Orange blank (stock-9). Astor wins at $2. Market refill: Blue blank (stock-3).
T34: Morgan sells Blue insider (stock-8) for $7. Insider ability: draws itip-53 (Blue +2 / Orange -1).
T35: Astor auctions Blue blank (stock-2). Morgan wins at $5. Market refill: The Squeeze (action-37).
T36: Hearst sells Yellow blank (stock-18) for $10.
T37: Morgan auctions Orange stock_down (stock-14). Astor wins at $4. stock_down: Blue -1 (7→6). Market refill: CRISIS (crisis-44) Newspaper Exposé! Tracker 9→10. GAME OVER!
